name: Phase 2 smoke condition C (scope-mismatched random) on FrontierScience-Olympiad
short_description: Per-row predictions from the matched-mismatch agent (condition C, random strategy) on the first 11 FrontierScience-Olympiad rows of the v2 dataset; partial run halted at the budget cap.
model_description: claude-haiku-4-5 via local Claude Code CLI. Agent library: matched_mismatch_v1 (t0010), strategy='random', delegate=scope_unaware_planandsolve_v1. Each phase receives a deliberately incorrect granularity tag drawn uniformly from the two non-correct choices.
prediction_schema: Each line is a JSON object with fields: condition, task_id, problem, gold_answer, final_answer, is_correct, decision_count, final_confidence, trajectory, agent_refused.

files.description: Partial per-row predictions for condition C on the first 11 FrontierScience-Olympiad hierarchy-complete rows; run halted at $18 budget cap before reaching the remaining 29 rows.
